result.markdown:
In this document, we will review the content from Unit 1: Coding in R. 

R can be used as a calculator. To compute this expression: 
$$ 4 * \left 2 + \frac{2}{3} \right $$

you must type 


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
4 * (2 + (2/3))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 10.66667
```


:::
:::
